content:
# Meta-Rule: Multi-Agent Coordination v85

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.75
AND tile_novelty > 0.57
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 8 automated workers
2. Explore high-uncertainty regions
3. Generate 11 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 17.5% improvement in knowledge coverage
